title: Bhagavatam Class
desc: A religious leader recites verses from the Bhagavad Gita and further elucidates it.

title: Kirtan
desc: Religious leaders and devotees gather to offer prayers, chant holy scriptures and sing sacred hymns.

title: Special Puja
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Class Srikrishna Lilamrito
desc: A religious leader discusses Sri Chaitanya Dev's life and his devotion to Lord Krishna.

title: Bhog Arati
desc: A priest offers prayers and conducts the ceremonial worship of the temple deities.

title: Tulsi Arati
desc: Hindu priests and devotees gather to pay obeisance to Tulasi, a sacred plant.

title: Sandhya Aarti
desc: A comprehensive and detailed insight into the evening rituals dedicated to God.

title: Bhagavad Gita Class
desc: A religious leader delivers a spiritual discourse on Bhagavad Gita to the devotees.

title: Class Bhagabat Madhuri
desc: A religious leader delivers discourses on holy scriptures and teachings of the Almighty.

title: Dhup Aarti
desc: Hindu priests worship the Sai Baba's idol along with the devotees who pray to the god.

title: Class Madhurya Kadumbini
desc: A religious leader delivers a discourse on the teachings of Goddess Saraswati.
